arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel played 'mind games' with Ross County striker as Ronan Hale reveals what Celtic keeper said to put him off
arts.sum: Ronan Hale needed a retake to beat Schmeichel but he insists the keeper's antics didn't spook him

arts.ttl: Preview: Sligo Rovers vs. Celtic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's friendly clash between Sligo Rovers and Celtic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: I've been a Celtic servant for 11 years and my dad is going to cry when I finally make Champions League debut
arts.sum: Kelly Clark is set to play in the Champions League proper for the first time ever

arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston's Celtic 'leader' status on and off the pitch refuses to subside this campaign
arts.sum: Celtic had Nicolas Kuhn to thank for saving their bacon against Ross County in the Scottish Premiership, but Alistair Johnston also deserves a major slice of the credit. Now up to five goal contributions in his opening ten games this season, Johnston regularly carries the torch for Celtic down the right flank to pass onto teammate Kuhn.
